items.summary: Tesla (TSLA) and SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) CEO Elon Musk is set to meet OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) CEO Sam Altman in court this week over an alleged breach of the private AI developer's non-profit mission. Musk is also a co-founder of OpenAI. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland break down the details of the court case.

items.headline: COPLUS Accelerates AIoT Transition: Capturing High-Margin Mobility Markets via NVIDIA Ecosystem
items.summary: COPLUS (2254.TW), a global leader in custom performance lighting holding over 1,000 patents, recently announced its strategic integration into the NVIDIA Developer Program. This milestone marks COPLUS's evolution from a hardware manufacturer into a high-growth AIoT Mobility Tech pioneer, strategically positioned to capture the rapidly expanding smart-vehicle infrastructure market.

items.headline: S&P 500 Holding Pattern: Mag 7 Earnings Collide With Oil Surge and Fed Fears
items.summary: Stocks opened in a holding pattern, with the S&P 500 (^GSPC) heading into the trading session fractionally lower after rising to all-time highs last week. Three forces pull in opposite directions: the heaviest tech earnings week of the quarter, a fresh jump in oil after Iran peace talks stalled, and a Federal Reserve meeting within ... S&P 500 Holding Pattern: Mag 7 Earnings Collide With Oil Surge and Fed Fears

items.headline: Tesla Officially Registers Elon Musk’s Stock: What Investors Need to Know
items.summary: Tesla  registered some stock for CEO Elon Musk.  Friday, Tesla filed forms with the Securities and Exchange Commission registering about 304 million shares of common stock relating to Musk’s 2018 pay award.  Tesla shareholders voted to award the often-debated options in 2012.

items.headline: China vetoes Meta’s $2B Manus deal after months-long probe
items.summary: China has ordered Meta to unwind its multibillion-dollar Manus acquisition, dealing a potential setback to Zuckerberg’s push into AI agents.
